race.comment: Good little race by midweek standards. POLYGLOT (4) made nice progress last start at the second run of the campaign, travelling up on the speed then digging deep to finish second over this distance at Rosehill. In the frame at eight of nine runs over today's journey. Sure to be highly competitive again. GRAND PRAIRIE (3) resumes. Won the Group 3 Up And Coming last prep before the form tapered. Goes well when fresh and has the class factor. SWEETHEARTED (1) has been in work for a while and keeps stepping up. Giving weight to some smart sprinters which is a concern, but he is honest and will run well. ICARIAN DREAM (6) has been freshened up after some decent form in Queensland stakes races. Cannot be underestimated. OUR QUEEN (7) is back from a five-month spell. Absolutely flies when fresh and is sure to be well found by the market.
